overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with red hair and tribal armor wading through a tropical river toward ancient stone ruins. The scene features crystal-clear turquoise water, dense palm forests, and crumbling historic structures in a bright, sunlit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical river shallows with palm forest

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through waist-deep turquoise water toward the distant shore

entered.detail: crumbling stone building partially covered by tropical vegetation on the left bank
wooden structure extending into the water across the river
rocky bank forming the edge of the river on the left side
tall palm trees lining the distant shore
dense green vegetation and trees along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character wades through clear turquoise river water surrounded by dense tropical vegetation. Ancient stone ruins and palm trees line the distant shore ahead, while a wooden dock structure is visible across the water. The scene is bright and open under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river edge with visible rocky bottom

events.description: water depth decreases revealing rocky riverbed and ancient ruins on the left bank

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as water becomes shallower and the rocky shoreline approaches

segments.scene_description: As the character moves forward, the water grows shallower revealing the rocky riverbed beneath. The ancient ruins on the left bank become more prominent and detailed, while the rocky shoreline draws closer. The wooden dock remains visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with ancient stone ruins

events.description: character steps out of shallow water onto the rocky shore

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the rocky terrain while approaching the ancient ruins structure

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto the rocky shoreline, transitioning from aquatic to terrestrial movement. The ancient stone ruins are now close on the left, showing detailed weathering and vegetation growth. The wooden dock across the river appears closer as the character advances along the bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character wades through a tropical river and transitions onto a rocky shoreline near ancient ruins. It begins with the character moving through clear turquoise water surrounded by dense tropical vegetation, with a wooden dock and stone structures visible on the distant shore. As the character advances, the water grows shallower to reveal the rocky riverbed beneath, bringing the detailed weathering of the ruins on the left bank into sharper focus. The scene then shifts as the character exits the water and steps onto the terrestrial shoreline, moving closer to the overgrown stone ruins. Finally, the camera follows the character along the bank as the wooden dock across the river looms larger in the distance.
